description: Design a NEMA 17 stepper motor mounting plate. The plate must be a 50mm x 50mm square with a 6mm thickness, centered at the origin. Include a 22mm diameter central pilot hole through the entire plate and four M3 countersunk (90 degrees) mounting holes with a 31mm center-to-center spacing, also centered at the origin. Apply 5mm fillets to the four outer corners. Save the completed file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nema_plate.FCStd.
